topic: My dog refuses to enter one corner of the yard where the grass never grows.
title: My Dog Won't Enter This Corner of the Yard | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My dog would not step into one corner of the yard where grass never grew.
scenes.image_prompt: A bare dirt patch in the corner of a green backyard, dim twilight, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We had played in that yard every single day for years.
scenes.image_prompt: A fenced backyard with a worn play path in the grass at dusk, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He chased his ball everywhere but there.
scenes.image_prompt: A tennis ball resting alone in a bare dirt corner of a yard, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He would freeze at its edge and growl low.
scenes.image_prompt: A dog silhouette standing rigid at the edge of a dark yard corner, twilight, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then he stopped going outside at all.
scenes.image_prompt: A dog seen from behind sitting at a back door staring out at a dim yard, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knelt in that corner and felt the soil was warm.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand pressing into bare dark soil in a yard corner, dim evening light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dug down two feet with a shovel that night.
scenes.image_prompt: A shallow hole dug in bare yard soil beside a shovel, faint flashlight glow, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I struck wood. A small door, flush with the earth.
scenes.image_prompt: A weathered wooden hatch revealed in dug soil, partly uncovered, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cold air rose from the seam, smelling of rain.
scenes.image_prompt: A wooden hatch in soil with faint mist seeping from its edges, night, dim glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I leaned close I heard my own dog barking beneath it.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed earth set wooden hatch in deep shadow under a single flashlight beam, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My dog was asleep on the couch inside the whole time.
scenes.image_prompt: A dog asleep on a couch seen from behind in a dim living room, low warm light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I buried it again. The barking still rises some nights.
scenes.image_prompt: A filled in patch of bare soil in a dark yard corner, twilight fog, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing
